systems.name: OpenCode Runtime
systems.description: Main runtime that constructs requests, processes streamed output, and fans updates to clients.

containers.name: Session Runtime
containers.description: Request assembly, provider streaming, and message state updates.

containers.name: Server Event Layer
containers.description: Bus and SSE fanout layer for streamed runtime events.

containers.name: Client Consumers
containers.description: Web, TUI, and subagent activity consumers.

components.name: Codex Request Builder
components.description: Builds local messages and attaches continuation handles for Codex requests.

components.name: Provider Delta Trimmer
components.description: Trims upstream request input when continuation identifiers are available.

components.name: Session Stream Processor
components.description: Transforms provider chunks into session part updates.

components.name: Message Event Publisher
components.description: Persists part state and publishes streamed message events.

components.name: SSE Fanout
components.description: Broadcasts runtime events to connected clients.

components.name: Web Delta Reducer
components.description: Applies streamed updates in the Web global sync path.

components.name: TUI Delta Sync
components.description: Applies streamed updates in the TUI sync path.

components.name: Subagent Bridge
components.description: Republishes child-session streamed updates into the parent runtime.

relationships.description: passes local message payload to provider-specific Codex trimming logic
streams assistant text deltas back into session processing
publishes message events for client fanout
delivers streamed events to Web global sync
delivers streamed events to TUI sync
reuses message events for child-session bridge fanout
republishes child streamed updates into parent-visible event flow
